# Airbnb Card

## Summary
The Airbnb card provides a summary of information related to an Airbnb listing, including details about the property, pricing, and host.

## Import
```javascript
import { Airbnb } from '../airbnb';
```

## Usage as a Field
You can use the Airbnb card as a field within a consuming card or field definition. For example:

```javascript
class MyCard extends CardDef {
  static fields = {
    airbnbListing: Airbnb.asField()
  };
}
```

## Template Usage
To display the Airbnb card within a template, you can use the following syntax:

```handlebars
<CardWrapper @card={{this.model.airbnbListing}} />
```

This will render the Airbnb card using the data provided in the `airbnbListing` field of the model.
